name: Chicken Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can cream of chicken soup
1 cup Chopped onion or onion salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover chicken with water and simmer for 30 minutes.
2. Cool, bone, and cut into strips; set aside.
3. Mix tomatoes, soup, chilies, cumin, and garlic powder.
4. Dip each tortilla in the broth left from boiling chicken.
5. Place one tortilla on a plate, add 2 tablespoons of the mixture and 1 tablespoon of cheese.
6. Roll up seam side down; place in baking pan.
7. After all are filled and rolled, pour remaining sauce evenly over enchiladas.
8. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
9. Bake at 350°F until cheese is melted (about 20 minutes).
